description: Learn to dance three beautiful social dances: polka, waltz, menuet. It's a chance to step into another era for an evening — to move, laugh, meet new people, and experience the joy of traditional ballroom dancing in a relaxed, welcoming setting. No experience needed. Just curiosity and a willingness to try. You'll learn real steps, dance with others, and leave knowing something you didn't know before. It's social, elegant, and surprisingly fun. And as a bonus — this is connected to the main event the Vancouver Spring Gala Ball. So if you enjoyed the workshop, please check out the Gala Ball Event. The Gala Ball is a participatory European-style evening where everyone dances together. Elegant, welcoming, and just a little magical. Beginner-friendly. Solo guests and couples welcome.
location: 7590 Mission, BURNABY, BC V3N 5C7, CA
